ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Modular: pick a news source + AI summarizer independently. Agentic: a single provider handles both search and summarization.
ast.target: 模块化：独立选择新闻来源和 AI 摘要器。Agentic：由单一提供方同时负责搜索与摘要。

ast.source: Where to retrieve news articles from

ast.source: AI model used to summarize retrieved articles

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Unified provider that handles both search and summarization
ast.target: 同时处理搜索与摘要的统一提供方

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the AI model to use
ast.target: 选择要使用的 AI 模型

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 要关注的新闻主题（用逗号分隔）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose level of detail for news summaries
ast.target: 选择新闻摘要的详细程度

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include analytical section in detailed news summaries
ast.target: 在详细新闻摘要中包含分析部分

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Total search results to fetch (higher values give more options but use more API quota)
ast.target: 要获取的搜索结果总数（数值越高选项越多，但会消耗更多 API 配额）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How far back to search for news (d1 = 1 day, d3 = 3 days, w1 = 1 week)
ast.target: 新闻搜索回溯多远（d1 = 1 天，d3 = 3 天，w1 = 1 周）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When to generate daily news (24-hour format, e.g., 08:00)
ast.target: 何时生成每日新闻（24 小时制，例如 08:00）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Folder to store daily news notes
ast.target: 存放每日新闻笔记的文件夹

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Daily news notes are automatically organized into monthly subfolders (YYYY-MM). Click below to reorganize existing notes.
ast.target: 每日新闻笔记会自动整理到按月子文件夹（YYYY-MM）中。点击下方可重新整理现有笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show notifications when news is generated

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add YAML frontmatter metadata to generated news files
ast.target: 为生成的新闻文件添加 YAML frontmatter 元数据

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 添加 datetime 字段（YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 添加 tags 数组（从 topics 自动生成）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 添加新闻来源/提供方信息

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 添加输出格式（详细/简洁）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional: Custom prompt for AI news evaluation (use {{NEWS_TEXT}} and {{TOPIC}} as placeholders)
ast.target: 可选：用于 AI 新闻评估的自定义提示词（使用 {{NEWS_TEXT}} 和 {{TOPIC}} 作为占位符）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How far back to search (d1 = 1 day, d2 = 2 days, w1 = 1 week)
ast.target: 向前检索多长时间（d1 = 1 天，d2 = 2 天，w1 = 1 周）

ast.target: 将现有的每日新闻文件移动到每月子文件夹中

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The `parsed` property on `text` blocks is deprecated, please use `parsed_output` instead.
ast.target: `text` 块上的 `parsed` 属性已弃用，请改用 `parsed_output`。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Response was truncated due to max_tokens limit
ast.target: 由于 max_tokens 限制，响应被截断

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Response was paused - turn was too long
ast.target: 响应已暂停 - 回合过长

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning text from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中有多个候选项，将返回第一个的文本。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning data from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中有多个候选项，将返回第一个的数据。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning function calls from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中有多个候选项，将返回第一个的函数调用。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning executable code from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中有多个候选项，将返回第一个的可执行代码。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: there are multiple candidates in the response, returning code execution result from the first one.
ast.target: 响应中有多个候选项，将返回第一个的代码执行结果。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: extraBody provided but current request body is a Blob. extraBody will be ignored as merging is not supported for Blob bodies.
ast.target: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: 已提供 extraBody，但当前请求体是 Blob。由于 Blob 请求体不支持合并，extraBody 将被忽略。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: Original request body is valid JSON but not a non-array object. Skip applying extraBody to the request body.
ast.target: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: 原始请求体是有效的 JSON，但不是非数组对象。跳过将 extraBody 应用于请求体。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: Original request body is not valid JSON. Skip applying extraBody to the request body.
ast.target: includeExtraBodyToRequestInit: 原始请求体不是有效的 JSON。跳过将 extraBody 应用于请求体。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Live music generation is experimental and may change in future versions.
ast.target: 实时音乐生成功能为实验性，可能会在未来版本中变更。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Setting `LiveConnectConfig.generation_config` is deprecated, please set the fields on `LiveConnectConfig` directly. This will become an error in a future version (not before Q3 2025).
ast.target: 设置 `LiveConnectConfig.generation_config` 已弃用，请直接在 `LiveConnectConfig` 上设置字段。这将在未来版本中变为错误（不早于 2025 年第三季度）。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: GoogleGenAI.interactions: Interactions usage is experimental and may change in future versions.
ast.target: GoogleGenAI.interactions: Interactions 用法为实验性，可能会在未来版本中变更。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: GoogleGenAI.interactions: Client level httpOptions.extraBody is not supported by the interactions client and will be ignored.
ast.target: GoogleGenAI.interactions: 交互客户端不支持客户端级别的 httpOptions.extraBody，将被忽略。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已打开今日新闻简报（回退方法）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to open news file. Try opening it manually.
ast.target: 无法打开新闻文件。请尝试手动打开。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid language code. Please enter a valid ISO 639-1 code (e.g., 'en', 'fr').
ast.target: 无效的语言代码。请输入有效的 ISO 639-1 代码（例如“en”、“fr”）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Daily news already generated for today.
ast.target: 今日的每日新闻已生成。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to create archive folder. Cannot create note.
ast.target: 创建归档文件夹失败。无法创建笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Daily news note created with errors. Please check the note.
ast.target: 每日新闻笔记创建时出现错误。请检查该笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to create note file. Check console for details.
ast.target: 创建笔记文件失败。请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to generate news. Error note created.
ast.target: 生成新闻失败。已创建错误笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to generate news. Could not create error note.
ast.target: 生成新闻失败。无法创建错误笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在生成今日新闻简报...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to generate news briefing. No note was created.
ast.target: 生成新闻简报失败。未创建笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to open or create daily news
ast.target: 无法打开或创建每日新闻

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Archive folder not found. Nothing to reorganize.
ast.target: 未找到归档文件夹。没有可重新整理的内容。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No daily news files found to reorganize.
ast.target: 未找到需要重新整理的每日新闻文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to reorganize notes. Check console for details.
ast.target: 重新整理笔记失败。请查看控制台了解详情。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 生成时间（例如：“Generated at 10:30:00 AM”）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 完整的星期名称（星期一、星期二…）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的主题名称

ast.name: label
ast.target: 用于网络地址的 Base64 字符串

ast.name: message
ast.source: xAI Responses API does not support this content type in user messages
ast.target: xAI Responses API 不支持用户消息中的此内容类型

ast.name: message
ast.source: xAI Responses API does not support this content type in assistant messages
ast.target: xAI Responses API 不支持助手消息中的此内容类型

ast.name: message
ast.source: prompt or messages must be defined
ast.target: 必须定义 prompt 或 messages

ast.name: message
ast.source: prompt and messages cannot be defined at the same time
ast.target: prompt 和 messages 不能同时定义

ast.name: message
ast.source: No object generated: could not parse the response.
ast.target: 未生成对象：无法解析响应。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add RSS feed URLs (one per line). The plugin will fetch news from these feeds and filter by topic.
ast.target: 添加 RSS 订阅源 URL（每行一个）。插件将从这些订阅源获取新闻并按主题筛选。
